prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年上海交通大学在山东省综合类最低录取位次分别为约1421名、1871名、2367名、2578名、2884名，呈持续后移趋势，5年间累计后移约1463名；近3年（2023→2025）累计后移约517名，年均后移约258名，后移速度有所放缓但方向未变；2025年基准位次约2884名；该校在山东省综合类招生计划：2021年104人、2022年78人、2023年151人、2024年108人、2025年109人；2026年计划107人，较2025年微减2人（-1.8%），属小幅缩招，对竞争略有加剧作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 上海交通大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名连续多年稳居第4名（2021–2026年均为第4名），属全国顶尖高校层次，对高分考生吸引力极强；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及学术不端（撤稿数量较多）及校园安全事件，但抖音热度为较热（总排名第42位），整体关注度仍较高；2021年曾出现投档线异常信号（河南理科华五倒数第一），但属低关注度事件，对山东省报考影响有限；上海交通大学拥有28个A-及以上学科，其中计算机科学与技术A+、机械工程A+、材料科学与工程A+、生物学A+、临床医学A+、工商管理A+等王牌学科与招生专业高度对应，学科实力全国顶尖，持续吸引优质生源。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等交大优势工科专业持续高热推荐；山东省考生总数从2021年54.4万持续增长至2025年68.1万，2026年预计约72万（+5.7%），竞争压力逐年加大；上海交通大学位于上海市，属一线城市，地域吸引力强；该校在山东省招生规模较大（100人以上），非本省高校，无本地倾斜因素。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年山东省考生总数明显增加（+3.9万）、招生计划微幅缩招（-2人）以及学校顶尖层次带来的持续吸引力，预计2026年最低录取位次在2025年基准2884名基础上继续小幅后移。，但考生规模扩大和历年趋势的强劲惯性需做正向修正。预测最低位次约2902名，波动区间2571–3233名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 电子信息类（计算机永强试验班/集成电路英才班/IEEE试点班）
- 人工智能（拔尖英才试点班/卓越人才试点班）
- 机械类（钱学森工程科学试点班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 理科试验班类（数学方向/物理方向）
- 金融学（含金融学、计算机双学士学位项目）
- 法学试验班（含双学士学位项目）
- 经济管理试验班（含双学士学位项目）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 工科试验班类
- 核工程与核技术
- 自然科学试验班
- 自然保护与环境生态类（含双学士学位项目）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约2902名，区间2571–3233名。位次在区间下限（2571名）以内可重点冲刺一档王牌专业（电子信息类、人工智能等）；位次在2902名附近建议以二档专业为主（理科试验班、金融学、法学等），兼顾一档冲刺；位次接近区间上限（3233名）建议以三档专业保底（工科试验班、自然科学试验班等），同时关注自然保护与环境生态类作为稳妥选择。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Shanghai Jiao Tong University in Shandong Province's comprehensive category were approximately 1421, 1871, 2367, 2578, and 2884, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1463 places over 5 years; in the recent 3 years (2023→2025), the cumulative backward shift was about 517 places, with an average annual backward shift of about 258 places, indicating a slowdown in the rate of backward shift but no change in direction; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 2884; the enrollment plan for this university in Shandong Province's comprehensive category: 104 in 2021, 78 in 2022, 151 in 2023, 108 in 2024, and 109 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 107, a slight decrease of 2 (-1.8%) compared to 2025, which is a small reduction in enrollment, slightly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shanghai Jiao Tong University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university, consistently ranking 4th in the Soft Science China University Rankings for many years (4th from 2021 to 2026), belonging to the top tier of national universities, strongly attracting high-scoring students; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is somewhat negative, mainly involving academic misconduct (a relatively high number of retractions) and campus safety incidents, but its Douyin popularity is relatively hot (overall ranking 42nd), indicating still high overall attention; in 2021, there was an abnormal signal in the admission cutoff line (Huawu ranked last in Henan science), but this was a low-attention event with limited impact on Shandong Province applications; Shanghai Jiao Tong University has 28 A- or above disciplines, including top-tier disciplines such as Computer Science and Technology A+, Mechanical Engineering A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, Biology A+, Clinical Medicine A+, and Business Administration A+, which highly correspond to its enrollment majors, with national top-tier disciplinary strength, continuously attracting high-quality students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science, electronic information/communication, electrical engineering, and other advantageous engineering majors at Jiao Tong University continue to be highly recommended; the total number of examinees in Shandong Province has steadily increased from 544,000 in 2021 to 681,000 in 2025, with an estimated 720,000 in 2026 (+5.7%), leading to increasing competitive pressure year by year; Shanghai Jiao Tong University is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city, with strong regional appeal; the university has a relatively large enrollment scale in Shandong Province (over 100 students), and it is not a local university, so there is no local preference factor.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend in historical rankings, the significant increase in the number of examinees in Shandong Province in 2026 (+39,000), the slight reduction in enrollment plan (-2 students), and the sustained appeal of the university's top-tier level, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will continue to shift slightly backward from the 2025 baseline of 2884. However, the expansion of the examinee pool and the strong inertia of the historical trend require a positive correction. The predicted minimum ranking is about 2902, with a fluctuation range of 2571–3233.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Electronic Information (Computer Yongqiang Pilot Class/Integrated Circuit Elite Class/IEEE Pilot Class)
- Artificial Intelligence (Top Talent Pilot Class/Outstanding Talent Pilot Class)
- Mechanical (Qian Xuesen Engineering Science Pilot Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Science Pilot Class (Mathematics Direction/Physics Direction)
- Finance (including Finance and Computer Science Dual Degree Program)
- Law Pilot Class (including Dual Degree Program)
- Economics and Management Pilot Class (including Dual Degree Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Engineering Pilot Class
- Nuclear Engineering and Nuclear Technology
- Natural Science Pilot Class
- Natural Conservation and Environmental Ecology (including Dual Degree Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 2902, range 2571–3233. If ranking is within the lower limit of the range (2571), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 top majors (Electronic Information, Artificial Intelligence, etc.); if ranking is around 2902, it is recommended to mainly target Tier 2 majors (Science Pilot Class, Finance, Law, etc.), while also attempting Tier 1 sprinting; if ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (3233), it is recommended to use Tier 3 majors as a safety net (Engineering Pilot Class, Natural Science Pilot Class, etc.), while also considering Natural Conservation and Environmental Ecology as a stable choice.
